_notes: G20 members: 19 nation states plus the European Union and the African Union. The two regional unions are not state-level features and so don't appear in this list. South Korea is the 19th state member.
name: Group of Twenty
mission: Forum of 19 major economies plus the EU and the AU, accounting for ~85% of global GDP. Coordinates on international financial stability, trade, climate, and crisis response.
